findings.summary: arch_fan_in lacked the truncated flag required by FR-013 for every list-returning tool.
findings.fix: APPLIED: n+1 fetch + with_truncation; truncated flag added.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: FK-schema closure recursed on calls.callee_name (qualified display strings like 'M.g') which never match unqualified functions.name — resolved multi-hop paths silently dropped, making arch_reaches/arch_unreachable under-report reachability.
cross_runtime_findings.evidence: closure emitted c.callee_name; CMT producer stores qualified callee display names
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: edges_from LEFT JOINs functions tf ON tf.id=c.callee_id; callee_expr = COALESCE(tf.name, c.callee_name) used in closure, fan_in, callers_of, callees_of; regression test test_fk_qualified_callee_closure (2-hop resolved path).

cross_runtime_findings.summary: Contract refusals were plain text; spec C-21/US-3.4 requires structured {"error":"REFUSED","reason":…} JSON in the isError text.
cross_runtime_findings.evidence: handle_tools_call put Error msg directly into content[0].text
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: sound_gate wraps contract_check errors as compact JSON; tests assert the envelope.

cross_runtime_findings.summary: arch_find/arch_exported rows omitted the exported/exposed flag required by US-2.2.
cross_runtime_findings.fix: APPLIED: fn_select/fn_row carry a third column (detected exp col, NULL-safe); exported:bool in rows; test added.

notes: Primary + spec-compliance inline (FR-001..022 swept post-fix); codex cross-runtime pass (read-only) found 3 issues incl. the HIGH FK-closure soundness bug — all fixed with regression tests. 87 tests green (26 arch_mcp incl. 2 new regressions), selftest-mcp OK, metrics byte-parity re-verified.
